subject: Portly male figure with dark hair in fighting gi, wide-eyed exaggerated expression, comedic pose
description: A heavyset male figure in a martial arts gi is rendered with an exaggerated, wide-eyed expression — mouth open, brows raised — conveying shock, discomfort, or comedic mortification. The hair is dark and the build is stocky. The background is a bright pink/lavender with sparkle effects, lending the scene an almost farcical or romantic-comedy visual language at odds with the martial arts context. The body language reads as flustered rather than aggressive, arms raised awkwardly. The overall composition is played for humor.
